top.title: Hezbollah rejects renewed ceasefire agreed by Israel and Lebanon

top.title: Trump hits back at 'unpatriotic' vote after House rebukes him over Iran
top.summary: The lower chamber of Congress passed a measure that seeks to halt further military action, in a vote seen as largely symbolic.

top.title: Who is Elon Musk and what is his net worth?
top.summary: The boss of X, Tesla and SpaceX is the world's richest person and has used his platform to make his views known on a vast array of topics.

top.title: Exams watchdog warns of rise in high-tech cheating
top.summary: Ofqual chief says invigilators are being trained to detect devices like smart glasses and hidden earpieces.

top.title: Phone signal on trains not good enough most of the time, research says
top.summary: Ofcom found the major phone networks were not providing good signal on trains, and train companies were slowing down wi-fi.
